motivation: A journey of a thousand miles is completed one step at a time
The secret of getting ahead is getting started. – Mark Twain
It always seems impossible until it's done. – Nelson Mandela
The most effective way to do it, is to do it. – Amelia Earhart
A journey of a thousand miles is completed one step at a time
The secret of getting ahead is getting started. – Mark Twain
It always seems impossible until it's done. – Nelson Mandela
The most effective way to do it, is to do it. – Amelia Earhart
The secret of getting ahead is getting started. – Mark Twain
It always seems impossible until it's done. – Nelson Mandela
Getting fit is hard work, being unfit and overweight is hard work - choose your hard.
You can have anything, you can't have everything - choose the things that matter the most
Getting fit is hard work, being unfit and overweight is hard work - choose your hard.
Every action taken towards your goal is a vote for the person you want to be and the life you want to live.
Counting calories is a faff, tracking and taking medication for being overweight is a bigger faff.
Taking the correct daily action isn't just for your benefit but for your kids and grandkids. Show up for them today.
Just think how nice it will feel being able to fit into that airline seat and do that family walk.
Don't be the reason your family can't have the adventure they want.
Think about all clothes, food and travel choices that will be open to you when you get travel fit.
Getting fit significantly increases your chances of having more days to travel in the future.
Not only are you helping yourself, but your actions will inspire others to do the same - whether they tell you or not.
Which are you going to regret more on your death bed, giving up a few takeaways or missing out on that travel adventure as you weren't fit enough?
Don't worry about what you did yesterday, don't worry about what you will do tomorrow. Focus on today - just today.
I am not a product of my circumstances. I am a product of my decisions. – Stephen Covey
The only person you are destined to become is the person you decide to be. – Ralph Waldo Emerson
Believe you can and you’re halfway there. – Theodore Roosevelt
Happiness is not something readymade.  It comes from your own actions. – Dalai Lama
It does not matter how slowly you go as long as you do not stop. – Confucius
Big dreams are achieved with small steps taken everyday
Believe in yourself the same way you believe and support your kids
You wouldn't feed your dog poison, so why feed it to yourself. Poor food choices are poison to your body.
You are doing great, just keeo going and take it one day at a time.
